plan_metadata.name: Feature intelli sense invalid yaml use DA None

steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent - Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot" option in the "New Project" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Add an Action" option in the dropdown menu of the "Create Declarative Agent" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown menu in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Click the "None" option in the "Select an authentication type" dropdown within the "Authentication Type" dialog of Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Select the "Default folder" option (path: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects) in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Explorer" icon (file sidebar) at the top of the Visual Studio Code sidebar to open the file explorer panel.
Click the "m365agents.yml" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select it.
Click the file icon next to "provision" in the "m365agents.yml" file within Visual Studio Code's editor, highlighting the start of the "provision" section.

Click the "dev" option in the "Select an environment" dropdown menu within Visual Studio Code's top-center interface. The dropdown is currently open above the code editor, and "dev" is highlighted for selection.
@assertion there is an item "+ New resource group“
Press the Escape key to close the "Select a resource group" dropdown modal in Visual Studio Code while editing the m365agents.yml file.
Click the "provision" section header in the `m365agents.yml` file within the Visual Studio Code editor, highlighting the start of the YAML configuration for provisioning an app.
Type text '1' into the m365agents.yml file at line 9, column 1 in the Visual Studio Code editor.
Press Ctrl+S to save changes to the "m365agents.yml" file in VS Code's editor.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code while editing the "m365agents.yml" file in the VSCAUSE_APP_NMDKF workspace.
Type the text "provision" into the VS Code command palette input box to filter available commands in the Microsoft 365 Agents workspace.
Press the Enter key to execute the "provision" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette, initiating the Microsoft 365 Agents: Provision action.
Click the "dev" option in the "Select an environment" dropdown menu at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
@assertion there is a notification showing InvalidYamlSchemaError
Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code while editing the "m365agents.yml" file to open the Command Palette.
Type text "Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish" into the VS Code command palette input field at the top center of the Visual Studio Code application window.
Press the Enter key to select "Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish" from the VS Code command palette input field.
Click the "dev" environment option in the "Select an environment" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there is a notification showing InvalidYamlSchemaError
